name_en: .🔥《With full set of original green box packaging》🔥【New】This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series mini shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, featuring double rings and a rectangular design, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with glossy leather.
name_cn:
.🔥《With full set of original green box packaging》🔥【New】This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series mini shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, featuring double rings and a rectangular design, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with glossy leather.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Interior: 1 open pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap (drop 52cm - 60cm); length adjustable from 112cm to 127cm
Flap closure
Model: 815205.
Mini dimensions: 20cm (W) x 14.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.4kg
Color: Black full grain/Original leather.
Made in Italy
